Environment Objectives: Maintain attainment status for 8-hour ozone levels for the MPA each year between 2020 and 2025
Increase number of publicly available alternative fueling and charging stations by 15% by 2025

Performance Measures: Percentage of low and zero emission transit vehicle in MTD's fleet
